_meta.description: Historical supply-chain incidents. Each entry documents a package that was compromised, sabotaged, or hijacked in the past even when the currently-latest version is clean. Keys are 'ecosystem/package' lowercased.
_meta.upstream_source_of_truth: OSV + GHSA + incident write-ups; expand via scripts/seed_historical_compromises.py

npm/colors.summary: Maintainer Marak Squires published an intentional infinite loop (liberty flag protest) breaking thousands of dependent projects.

npm/faker.summary: Same author as colors; published an empty version 6.6.6 as protest. Community forked to @faker-js/faker.

npm/event-stream.summary: Malicious flatmap-stream dependency injected via handover to a new maintainer; targeted Copay bitcoin wallets.

npm/flatmap-stream.summary: Malicious package created specifically as payload carrier for the event-stream incident. Do not install any version.

npm/ua-parser-js.summary: Maintainer npm account hijacked; malicious releases shipped a cryptominer + password stealer. Fixed in 0.7.30/0.8.1/1.0.1.

npm/node-ipc.summary: 'Peacenotwar' geo-targeted wipe against RU/BY IPs shipped by the maintainer as protest.

npm/coa.summary: Account hijack; password stealer payload similar to ua-parser-js. Affected downstream: react-scripts.

npm/rc.summary: Coordinated with coa hijack; same attacker group injected the same stealer.

pypi/ctx.summary: Maintainer's expired email domain was re-registered and used to reset PyPI credentials; malicious releases exfiltrated env vars. Already flagged by OSV (GHSA-67r3-h899-9w95).

pypi/phpass.summary: Same domain-takeover methodology as ctx, same attacker; env-var exfiltration.

rubygems/rest-client.summary: Old version line hijacked; cryptominer + remote-code-exec backdoor. Yanked.

pypi/jellyfish.summary: SSH key & GPG key exfiltration via post-install hook.

pypi/django-rest-framework-simplejwt.summary: CVE-2024-22513: information disclosure via improperly-rejected tokens. Historical note — no active compromise.
